name: git-python

metadata.name: git-python
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for git-python==1.1.1

documentation:
git-python
^^^^^^^^^^

combination and simplification of some useful git commands

Usage
*****

1. add and commit

  gp addc -m <message>

2. push as tag

  gp pushc addt -t <tag>

  gp pushc addr -t <tag> -n <name> -r <remote>

  gp pushc pusht -t <tag>
